### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>cpuguy83/go-md2man (github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.0.4`](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/releases/tag/v2.0.4)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/compare/v2.0.3...v2.0.4)

#### What's Changed

-   Clean up build stuff by [@​cpuguy83](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/77](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/77)
-   Bump actions/setup-go from 4 to 5 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/108](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/108)
-   Bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 3.7.0 to 4.0.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/114](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/114)
-   Prepend table preprocessor by [@​cpuguy83](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/111](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/111)
-   Fix trailing newline in code blocks by [@​cpuguy83](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/113](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/113)
-   Fix escape characters for content with newline by [@​cpuguy83](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/112](https://togithub.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/112)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/compare/v2.0.3...v2.0.4
